name: Chicago

views.label: City view
views.blurb: Anchor = the lakefront corridor (5.4 × 12.5 km: whole route + Streeterville start window). Phones show the corridor; desktop fills the negative space east with Lake Michigan — the old A and B are now one design.

notes: east lake = synthetic fill beyond data bbox (21.8 km)
detail buildings from chicago.json (5282 volumes; dropped 1450 fabric under window)
